name: Drawback Allowance Despite Non-Compliance

eligibility.description: Claimants who failed to meet specific regulatory requirements but can establish the factual qualifying use of the distilled spirits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prevents the denial of a tax refund claim for technical failures to comply with regulations if the taxpayer can prove the spirits were actually used for qualifying nonbeverage purposes.
